notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Lukes. Adley Rutschman scores.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Nathan Lukes. Adley Rutschman scores. Pete Alonso to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson pops out to shortstop Andrés Giménez on the infield fly rule.
